title: Aave launches V4 on Avalanche, laying groundwork for tokenized credit markets
summary: The deployment marks Aave V4’s first expansion beyond Ethereum and introduces lending infrastructure designed to support future markets for tokenized real-world assets.

title: Securitize, Cantor target tokenized IPOs for public markets
summary: Securitize and Cantor Fitzgerald are developing infrastructure for tokenized IPOs and secondary equity offerings within the existing US securities framework.

title: Bitcoin Price Jumps Over $65,500 on Soft Inflation Data
summary:
Bitcoin Magazine

Bitcoin Price Jumps Over $65,500 on Soft Inflation Data 
Bitcoin price jumped over $65,000 per coin after US inflation data was cooler than expected. 
This post Bitcoin Price Jumps Over $65,500 on Soft Inflation Data  first appeared on Bitcoin Magazine and is written by Mathew Di S

title: US Treasury Freezes $131 Million in Iran-Linked Crypto Wallets
summary: OFAC sanctioned addresses tied to Iran's central bank and armed forces, with Tether locking four Tron wallets as Washington's financial campaign against Tehran accelerates.

title: Bitcoin Breaks Heavy Resistance—But Death Cross Looms: Analysis
summary: BTC cleared a key resistance level Tuesday, giving bulls hope. Prediction market traders aren't convinced.

title: BlackRock outlines vision for crypto-TradFi convergence as product pipeline grows
summary: The firm seeks to offer tokenized long-term investments like "Treasury funds, iShares ETFs, and even private markets."

title: Crypto clearinghouse Glacis Labs raises $6.8 million seed to expand ZeroDelta platform
summary: Glacis aims to expand ZeroDelta, its multichain clearing platform for stablecoins, into tokenized securities and foreign exchange over time.

title: Oil traders warn market is close to running on empty as Hormuz shuts again
summary: Stockpiles that acted as shock absorbers early in Iran war are running low as key waterway closes once more

title: Trump’s return to war with Iran offers no clear path to victory
summary: Gamble on resuming hostilities raises prospect that conflict will overshadow president’s second term

title: It’s a buyer’s market for bonds
summary: Bonds are out of fashion with big investors — which makes them an interesting investment opportunity for the rest of us.

title: America’s oil refiners could more than triple profits as Iran war sparks massive boom
summary: U.S. oil refiners are about to report a historic profit surge as the industry takes advantage of supply disruptions.
